title: MISO Zonal Load Hourly CSV download
description:
Load by Local Resource Zone (LRZ) in MISO in hourly intervals. 

Published each morning for previous day. 

These LZRs are grouped by number and contain the following Local Balancing Authorities  

* Zone 1: DCP, GRE, MDU, MP, NSP, OTP, SMP
* Zone 2 and 7: ATLE, MGE, UPPC, WEC, WPS, CONS, DECO
* Zone 3 and 5: ALTW, MEC, MPW, AMMO, CWLP
* Zone 4: AMIL, CWLP, SIPC
* Zone 6: BREC, DUK(IN), HE, IPL, NIPSCO, SIGE
* Zone 8, 9, and 10: EAI, CLEC, EES, LAFA, LAGN, LEPA, SME,

More info: [Guide to data](https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Daily%20Forecast%20and%20Actual%20Load%20by%20Local%20Resource%20Zone_Daily%20Forecast%20and%20Actual%20Load%20Report%20by%20Local%20Resource%20Zone%20Report%20Readers%20Guide.pdf)
